name: io.github.609NFT/vibekit-mcp
title: VibeKit
description: Build, deploy & manage hosted apps and chat with their AI coding agents from any MCP client.

environmentVariables.name: VIBEKIT_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your VibeKit API key (vk_...). Get one from the VibeKit bot on Telegram with the /apikey command.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer vk_... — your VibeKit API key. Get one from the VibeKit bot on Telegram with /apikey. (Clients that can't set headers may instead append ?api_key=vk_... to the URL.)
